claim: The factory surface should gain its own internal namespace before any implementation files are moved.
mechanism: The scaffold and gap-analysis modules are already acting as one internal product surface, but callers still reach into multiple top-level modules directly. A factory namespace creates one compatibility seam, so later refactors can move factory implementation files without forcing repeated import rewrites across the CLI and loop controller.
boundary: This namespace does not yet reduce factory complexity by itself. It only creates the stable import surface needed for safer later movement.
